scripts.docker:prod: NODE_ENV=production DOCKER_BUILD_TARGET=production docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production up --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:prod:build: NODE_ENV=production DOCKER_BUILD_TARGET=production docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production build --no-cache
scripts.docker:prod:down: NODE_ENV=production DOCKER_BUILD_TARGET=production docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production down
scripts.docker:logs:prod: NODE_ENV=production docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production logs -f app
